4-6. From these verses we see the practice of the Church after men and women are baptized. They meet together often to "teach one another the doctrine of the kingdom" (see D&C 88:77) and to fellowship and strengthen one another through "all [their] conversation, in all [their] prayers, in all [their] exhortations, and in all [their] doings" (see D&C 108:7). This spiritual fellowshipping and…
